sn20.12:1.2: “Monks, did you hear that jackal1 howling in the last watch of the night?”
sn20.12:1.4: “That jackal is afflicted with a disease called mange. There might be some gratitude & thankfulness in that jackal, but there might not be any gratitude & thankfulness in a certain person here claiming to be a follower of the Sakyan.
sn20.12:1.7: The least little favor done for us won’t be forgotten.’
sn20.12:1.8: That’s how you should train yourselves.”
